dimensions.rationale: The receipt hash and subject bind the exact baseline, candidate, and tree; its scope is LOCAL_SYNTHETIC_ONLY with zero declared protected execution or remote writes.
The claimed exact v1.0.4-to-v1.0.5 closure transition is not schema-enforced: version and resolved-finding alternatives are independent, so crossed stale/closed states validate.
A later successor can present an internally inconsistent closure status that passes the delivery-status schema, undermining the asserted fail-closed status truthfulness.
The receipt reports zero remote writes and removed ephemeral outputs; regression coverage rejects reviewed workflow and assurance-surface drift.

findings.finding: PRODUCTION_RUN is now both Kill-controlled and capacity-gated, resolving the prior UNKNOWN/RED and KILL-007 bypass.
findings.resolution_ref: OperationalGate applies the production_enabled Kill flag and fail-closed capacity authorization before PRODUCTION_RUN.

findings.finding: Post-review closure protects all workflow paths and the reviewed runtime, test, dependency, and assurance surfaces.
findings.resolution_ref: The complete protected-prefix set and adversarial drift regression block post-review effect-surface changes.

findings.finding: The delivery-status schema permits invalid crossed states: package_version 1.0.4 with the RMD-05-closed finding set, and 1.0.5 with the pre-closure finding set, because the two alternatives are not coupled.
findings.required_fix: Encode two coupled full-state alternatives that bind 1.0.4 to the pre-closure findings and 1.0.5 to the RMD-05-closed findings; add adversarial tests rejecting both crossed states, recapture applicable evidence, and obtain fresh independent rereviews.

limitations: This read-only local review does not prove remote CI, protected Oracle behavior, real Gmail/private-repository behavior, production health, final AC-033, deployment, publication, or RMD-06/RMD-07 readiness.
Raw command logs were intentionally not retained, so this review verified receipt hashing and sanitized-output digests rather than independently replaying gate execution.
summary: FAIL: RMD05-001 and RMD05-CLOSURE-001 are resolved, but RMD05-CLOSURE-002 remains open because the claimed exact delivery-status transition is bypassable by schema-valid crossed states.
